name: Pylon
author: Poki
description: Pylon is a puzzle game that revolutionizes the classic Tetris experience by introducing multiple playing fields! Unlike traditional Tetris, Pylon offers four playing fields in different directions, allowing you to position shapes freely across them. Each field offers various multipliers that change along with the gameplay, so you need to plan the shapes strategically for better scores! With two distinct modes to choose from, you can progress steadily in Level mode or test your skills in Survival mode to achieve the highest score ever. Challenge your friends to see who can build the tallest pylon while getting more points! How to play Pylon? Move the shapes left or right: A/D, left/right arrow keys, or swipe left/right Drop the shapes: S, down arrow key, or swipe down Change direction: W, up arrow key, space bar, or tap the cube in the middle Who created Pylon? Pylon is created by Colin Lane Games AB. Play their other games on Poki: Temple of Boom , Wrassling , Rowdy Wrestling , Knight Brawl , Dunkers , Touchdowners , Rowdy City Wrestling , Golf Zero , Battle Golf , Big Shot Boxing and Fortz ! How can I play Pylon for free? You can play Pylon for free on Poki. Can I play Pylon on mobile devices and desktop? Pylon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
